title: Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Development Council (MDC) Resolution No. 2019-02, dated February 15,2019, entitled ?Resolution reprogramming and approving the projects under the 20% Municipal Development Plan CY 2018 amounting to One Hundred Seven Million Nine Hundred Thousand Seven Hundred Fifty Nine Pesos and 47/100 (Php 107,900,759.47) as continuing appropriations for CY 2019?.
